name: Flashback
overview: The protagonists, each with their own, unique, satirical humor, undertake, through short episodes, to bring to life everyday moments of our lives with technology, in contrast to what we lived in the early 80s, before it entered our lives. Through the self-contained humorous sketches, we enjoy a comedic journey through time and remember all the reasons why technological achievements improved the daily lives of all of us, from the small and simple to the very important.

trailers.title: Flashback: Η νέα κωμική σειρά μυθοπλασίας έρχεται αποκλειστικά στο κανάλι της COSMOTE στο YouTube
